researchQuestion: How does proportional horizontal onset and duration compare with an explicit beat and subdivision grid while the canonical melody and absolute-chromatic vertical pitch mapping are held constant?

controlledVariables.description: Use the pinned M-A canonical document and its deterministic normalized arrangement in both treatments.
Use mnls.pitch.absolute-chromatic-y@1 with identical materialized options in both treatments.
Use mnls.labels.exact-pitch@1 and retain exact pitch text in both treatments.
Expose exact pitch, onset, duration, source order, specificity, and provenance in both treatments.
Use mnls.renderer.html-svg@1, comparison-wide layout, en locale, and mnls.decimal@1 rounding in both treatments.
Use the same verified idea-boundary@1 learning plan overlay in both treatments.

changedVariables.description: Compare fixed beat/subdivision cells with proportional horizontal onset.
Compare exact grid spans with proportional horizontal duration extent.
Compare beat/subdivision guides with proportional time-reference guides.

tasks.description: Locate the onset of each source-order melody event in both treatments.
Read and compare the three exact melody durations in both treatments.
Follow repeated, stepwise, and larger pitch movements while vertical mapping remains controlled.

observations.description: Record human comments about locating onset and duration; automated execution does not populate this field.
Record whether a reviewer understands that both pages derive from one source; automated execution does not populate this field.
